# GitHub About Section

This file documents the recommended GitHub repo About settings.
These must be set manually via the GitHub UI (gear icon next to "About").

## Description
Full-stack real estate platform for Vrindavan/Mathura — Django REST + React 19 + JWT auth + Cloudinary. Phase 3 adds ML price prediction and AI chatbot.
